title: trapa natans var. japonica
intro: Trapa natans var. japonica, also known as the Japanese water chestnut or Japanese water caltrop, is a variety of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Trapaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Trapa natans var. japonica include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from digestive issues to skin problems.
